title: Illusionist / 幻术师
description:
A standalone mirror-and-illusion character for Slay the Spire 2, with three coupled systems:

- Mirror: "Copy" summons mirror images that replay your first card each turn and shatter when you take unblocked damage.
- Intent: read and reflect enemy telegraphs (Counter, Foresight, Provoke).
- Transmute: temporarily reshape your own cards (Shifting Blade, Myriad Faces, Phantom Blast), with a transmute stack that unwinds one layer per turn.

~40 themed cards, custom relics and potions, a starter relic, and Orobas (Ancient) relic/card upgrades.

Fully localized in English and 简体中文.
changeNote: v0.2.3 - Transmuted cards now revert at the START of your next turn (after the draw, before you play) instead of end of turn, so they last through the enemy's turn and there's no longer any race between reverting and an enemy acting (notably with Improvise's auto-played card). Fixed a draw failure where a reverted card could get stuck on top of the draw pile and silently stall the draw. Reshape reworked: it now grants permanent Replay (like Transfigure) without overwriting an existing enchantment, and costs 2. Includes everything from the standalone-character base: three coupled systems (Mirror, Intent, Transmute), Kindle and Summon, own Strike/Defend, Transmute pulls from the exhaust pile, all known crashes fixed. English & 简体中文.
